justification: The question concerns the effective yield of corporate high-yield debt securities, which is a key indicator of credit market conditions and investment performance.
question: Will the effective yield of securities with an investment grade rating of CCC or below in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-04-12?
